history.note: ui-contracts.js: viewport-stamped baseline files (ui-baseline-WxH.json) replace fixed ui-baseline.json — no TARGET_W/H constants to maintain, each machine auto-discovers and checks its own baseline; enforceViewport removed; baselineUrl() computed from window.innerWidth/innerHeight at call time; index.html: force-mobile-layout split into standalone ruleset separate from @media block

Fix: diagram edge labels now show ✅ instead of ✓ on visited paths; visitedEdges captured per test case so row-click correctly shows traversed paths; old results drawer dismissed when Test button is clicked

Mobile results drawer: larger touch-friendly header (52px, 14px font); slide-down collapse via translateY transition instead of display:none; starts collapsed on mobile; diagram-pane reserves bottom space for drawer title bar; auto-selects first row on open; toolbar buttons emoji above label with
; Restart and Replay buttons same treatment

UI: toolbar buttons restored to large touch-friendly style (flex:1, 12px 10px padding, 14px font, line-height 1.3, min-width 70px); Paths button re-added; button order matches Chatbot Logic IDE reference

UI: permanent #slide-handle on left edge of right pane — always visible including when fully collapsed; desktop drag resizes both panes; mobile tap toggles collapse, drag sets width freely with snap-to-collapse below 120px; right pane starts at 88% on mobile leaving diagram visible; toolbar restored to old large touch-friendly button style (8px 16px padding, 13px font, full labels: Save Flow, Load Flow, Test, Load Results); mobile-restore-btn removed; keyboard-shift fix retained (position:fixed #app)
Fix: keyboard resize — layout root changed to position:fixed/inset:0; floating mobile-restore-btn outside right pane; swipe-to-restore removed

Mobile UI: pinch-to-zoom on diagram (zoom buttons hidden on touch devices); desktop pane resize drag handle between diagram and right pane; mobile collapse tab on left edge of right pane slides pane away to reveal diagram (replaces full swipe-away); test results drawer touch-draggable via MutationObserver; swipe gestures preserved on non-interactive areas
Fix: test results viewer captures and restores visitedEdges per case; _visitedEdges exposed on window; _replayTrace/_restartRuntime accept overrideConfig

UI: SM-IDE title bar with version badge; toolbar buttons no longer overflow; context viewer collapsed by default with slide toggle; 100dvh + safe-area-inset fixes mobile URL bar overlap; touch pan on diagram; mobile swipe handle to reveal diagram behind right pane; test results row click restores captured state instantly without re-running; replay input populated on row click for manual re-run; invoke-aware duration estimator in generate-traces.js
Feature: generate-traces.js — runAllTraces() with self-test comparison, draggable/collapsible results drawer, stop button, load results from saved JSON, downloadTestResults()
Fix: user bubbles driven by trace length delta; replay restart ownership moved to _replayTrace; onReplayStep increments _lastTraceLength to prevent doubles
Phase 3: Runtime isolation — ChatEngine renamed Runtime; zero UI knowledge; single onSnapshot callback; main.js split into renderChat + renderIDE
Phase 2: Logger abstraction — nullLogger/consoleLogger/resolveLogger; ChatEngine accepts injected logger; production silent by default, debug via ?debug=true or localStorage
Fix: visited edge key changed from fromState|toState to fromState|eventType
Fix: diagram-canvas position:absolute so SVG renders visibly; zoom/pan/reset working
Fix: drop linkStyle and ==> arrows; visited edges marked with checkmark label prefix
Feature: diagram fits viewport; zoom/pan controls; visited edge tracking
Fix: Load Flow accepts ZIP, bare .json, bare .js, or pair
Feature: Save/Load Flow as paired ZIP
Fix: layout fits 100% zoom; Send button added
Fix: deep copy config before mutation in start()
Fix: pre-generate assign closures for XState 5
Diagnostics: raw action log, version+URL at boot
Fix: combine updateContext actions on email SUBMIT
Fix: user bubble ordering
Fix: diagram array transitions, validation bubble, replay guard check
Phase 1: validation moved to XState-native guards
Input validation + state-change logging
Initial release
